case_title: CITIBANK SOUTH DAKOTA, N.A. VS. JERRY G GRISSOM et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT GRISSOM, JERRY G
